title: frankenia orthotricha
intro: Frankenia orthotricha, also known as desert saltbush, is a small, shrub-like plant that belongs to the family Frankeniaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Frankenia orthotricha include treating wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues, as well as providing relief from fever and pain. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be applied topically or consumed orally.
